calendar.matters:
Petiton For Order Confiming Trust Assets (Probate Code Section 850 (A)(3)
Off Calendar Sep-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Christopher Cole appeared via for Juliana Gum (petitioner).

Mr. Cole stated that only one asset out of the four is at issue, that the Transamerica Life Insurance Policy is a different policy, and that it may be worth around $5,000.00. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
